route: #storm (view-storm, SPA view; container #stormCenterContainer hydrated by storm-center.js)
label: 🔄 Refresh Alerts
expected_behavior: Calls StormCenter.refresh(): removes the nbd_storm_alerts_cache localStorage key, re-resolves user geolocation (falls back to Cincinnati 39.1031,-84.5120), then re-fetches active NWS alerts (api.weather.gov) for the user's NWS zone/state, re-scores them and re-renders. Button shows '⏳ Loading...' while isLoading. Toast 'Could not fetch weather alerts' on failure.
notes: Top-right header button on every Storm Center tab. Live external NWS fetch; verify offline/blocked-tile behavior. Tiles hardcoded to Esri server.arcgisonline.com (memory: Brave blocks Esri → black void) — known risk, no Google fallback in this file.

label: 📡 Live Alerts
expected_behavior: StormCenter.setTab('alerts') → sets currentTab='alerts' and re-renders. Shows the active-alerts list (renderAlertsTab): each NWS alert as a severity-colored card with event icon, areaDesc, severity/hail/wind/damage-prob chips, time-ago + expiry, and a CREATE ZONE button. Empty state '☀️ No Active Alerts' when alerts=[].
notes: Default active tab on view open.

label: 🗺️ Storm Zones
expected_behavior: StormCenter.setTab('zones') → re-renders showing saved storm zones (renderZonesTab) from localStorage nbd_storm_zones. Each zone card is clickable (data-storm-action=openZone) with status/roofs/knocks/pipeline chips and inline Plan + Knock buttons. Empty state '🗺️ No Storm Zones Yet'.
notes: GAP-FLAG REBUTTAL: the critic asked for 'Storm Zones drawing tools' — there are NONE. The Storm Zones tab has no Leaflet draw/polygon-draw controls. Zones are created exclusively FROM alerts (createZone) or rendered from the NWS alert polygon. The only map control is the default Leaflet zoom control (L.control.zoom topright). No freehand drawing UI exists.

label: 🚪 Canvass Plans
expected_behavior: StormCenter.setTab('canvass') → re-renders renderCanvassTab showing only zones that have a generated canvassPlan: priority badge, optimal-window card, revenue projection tiles, numbered action steps, talking points, suggested team size, and a full-width 'START KNOCKING THIS ZONE' button. Empty state '📋 No Canvass Plans Yet' until a plan is generated from a zone.
notes: Content is purely generated read-only data; no inputs. Plans appear only after a Storm Zones 'Plan' button is clicked (generatePlan).

label: 📊 Storm Analytics
expected_behavior: StormCenter.setTab('analytics') → re-renders renderAnalyticsTab: computed stat tiles (Total Zones, Storm Knocks, Leads Generated, Conversion Rate), a Zone History list, and a Carrier Response Times grid (static CARRIER_RESPONSE constants). All read-only; no controls inside the tab.
notes: knockCount/leadCount are never incremented anywhere in storm-center.js (always 0) — analytics will show all zeros in practice. Worth a data-correctness flag.

label: CREATE ZONE
expected_behavior: StormCenter.createZone(alertId) → createZoneFromAlert finds the alert, builds a storm zone (sz_<ts>) with estimated roofs (polygon area × 200/sq-mi), unshifts into stormZones, persists to localStorage nbd_storm_zones, toasts 'Storm zone created: <name>', and re-renders. Also present in the alert-polygon map popup.
reveal_state: after:refresh (requires at least one active alert)
notes: Local-only write (no Firestore). Hard to exercise without a live severe-weather alert; QA may need to inject a fake alert into the alerts state.

label: Storm zone card (View)
expected_behavior: StormCenter.openZone(zoneId) → openZoneDetail sets activeZone, forces currentTab='zones', re-renders, and (if map ready) centers the Leaflet map on zone.center at zoom 11. Also exposed as a 'View' button in the zone map popup.
notes: Whole card is the click target; inner Plan/Knock buttons carry data-storm-stop='1' to stopPropagation.

label: 📋 Plan
expected_behavior: StormCenter.generatePlan(zoneId) → generatePlanForZone builds a canvass plan (priority by score, optimal 24-72h window, talking points keyed off hail/wind, carrier insights, revenue estimate, steps), saves it onto the zone in localStorage, switches currentTab='canvass' and re-renders. stopPropagation prevents the parent card's openZone.

label: 🚪 Knock / 🚪 START KNOCKING THIS ZONE
expected_behavior: StormCenter.pushToD2D(zoneId) → pushZoneToD2DById sets zone.status='canvassing', saves localStorage, then pushZoneToD2D writes a 'territories' doc to Firestore (addDoc with userId + companyId resolved from _userClaims.companyId||uid) when _db/_user present, toasts 'Territory pushed to D2D Tracker', and createLeadsFromZone calls window.goTo('d2d') + toast.
notes: Only Storm Center control that performs a Firestore write. Verify companyId tagging matches tenancy rules (memory: companyId unification). Three render sites: zones-tab small button, canvass-tab full-width button, zone map popup 'Start Knocking'.

label: ← Back to Dashboard
expected_behavior: Generic dashboard data-action='goTo' delegate navigates the SPA to the dash view. Defined in the static template header (tpl-view-storm), not in storm-center.js.
notes: Static header breadcrumb above the JS-hydrated container.

label: + NEW DEAL
expected_behavior: CloseBoard.createNew() → sets currentTab='create' and re-renders, showing the New Deal Room form. Top-right header button.

label: 📋 Active Deals
expected_behavior: CloseBoard.setTab('active') → currentTab='active', re-renders renderActiveDeals: every deal room as a card with customer name/address, status chip (draft/sent/viewed/accepted/signed/scheduled/expired), better-tier price, view count, sent-via, created/expires, and a 4-button action column (Preview/Text/Email/Copy). Empty state '📋 No Deal Rooms Yet'.
notes: Default active tab.

label: ➕ New Deal
expected_behavior: CloseBoard.setTab('create') → currentTab='create', re-renders the New Deal Room form (renderCreateForm).
notes: Same destination as the header + NEW DEAL button.

label: 📊 Analytics
expected_behavior: CloseBoard.setTab('analytics') → currentTab='analytics', re-renders renderAnalytics: Total/Sent/Viewed/Close-Rate stat tiles + a 3-step Conversion Funnel (Created→Sent, Sent→Viewed, Viewed→Signed) with proportional bars. Read-only.
notes: GAP-FLAG REBUTTAL: critic asked for 'add/edit/move deal' kanban-style editor. Close Board has NO move/drag and NO per-deal edit form — only 3 tabs (Active/New/Analytics). updateDeal/deleteDeal exist on the public API but are NOT wired to any visible control (no Edit or Delete button is rendered). Status changes happen only programmatically (sendSMS/sendEmail set status='sent').

label: Customer Name / Phone / Email / Address
expected_behavior: Plain text/tel/email inputs read by submitCreateForm on CREATE DEAL ROOM. Customer Name is required (toast 'Customer name is required' if blank). Values flow into createDealRoom opts.
notes: Four-field customer block; phone/email optional but gate the Text/Email send buttons later.

label: Good ($) / Better ($) / Best ($)
expected_behavior: Number inputs for the three pricing tiers. submitCreateForm requires at least one non-zero tier (toast 'Enter at least one tier price'). Values become deal.tiers.{good,better,best}.price used in the shareable deal page and financing math.

label: Insurance claim
expected_behavior: Checkbox; an init-bound change listener (close-board.js:903) toggles #cb-ins-fields display block/none, revealing the carrier + deductible inputs. Value read as isInsurance in submitCreateForm → deal.insuranceClaim.
notes: Listener is bound via a single setTimeout(100) in init() — if the user switches tabs and back, the listener may not re-bind on re-render (render() does not re-bind it). Possible bug: toggle dead after a tab round-trip.

label: Insurance carrier / Deductible $
expected_behavior: Hidden until #cb-insurance is checked. Read by submitCreateForm into deal.insuranceCarrier / deal.deductible; surface in the shareable deal page's insurance box.

label: CREATE DEAL ROOM
expected_behavior: CloseBoard.submitCreate() → submitCreateForm validates (name required, ≥1 tier price), builds a deal via createDealRoom (status=draft, 14-day expiry, generateId dr_<ts>), persists to localStorage nbd_deal_rooms AND syncDealToFirestore (setDoc deal_rooms/<id> merged, tagged userId+companyId), toasts 'Deal room created for <name>', switches to Active tab.
notes: Firestore write — verify companyId tenancy tagging. This is the primary deal-creation path.

label: 👁 Preview
expected_behavior: CloseBoard.preview(dealId) → openDealPreview generates the full shareable deal-page HTML and opens it through NBDDocViewer.open({html, title, filename}) as same-origin srcdoc (Print/PDF/Email/Save controls live inside the viewer). Falls back to window.open + document.write if NBDDocViewer absent.
notes: Per memory docviewer-preview-srcdoc-rule: preview must be same-origin srcdoc — this path passes raw html (correct). The generated deal page's own Accept/Sign canvas + submit are inside the previewed HTML, not dashboard controls.

label: 📱 Text
expected_behavior: CloseBoard.sendSMS(dealId) → sendViaSMS: requires customerPhone (toast 'No phone number' if missing), uploads the deal page to Firebase Storage (uploadDealPage → deal_rooms/<uid>/<id>.html, getDownloadURL), opens sms:<phone>?body=<prefilled link msg> via window.open(_self), and updateDeal sets status=sent, sentVia='sms', sentAt now (Firestore sync).
notes: DANGER=send: opens the device SMS composer with a real customer-facing estimate link and mutates deal status to 'sent'. Uploads HTML to Storage (cross-origin download URL).

label: 📧 Email
expected_behavior: CloseBoard.sendEmail(dealId) → sendViaEmail: requires customerEmail (toast 'No email' if missing), uploads deal page to Storage, opens mailto:<email>?subject=&body=<prefilled link + rep signature> via window.open(_self), and updateDeal sets status=sent, sentVia='email', sentAt now (Firestore sync).
notes: DANGER=send: opens mail client with a customer-facing estimate and mutates deal status.

label: 🔗 Copy
expected_behavior: CloseBoard.copyLink(dealId) → copyDealLink: if deal.shareUrl exists, navigator.clipboard.writeText(it) + toast 'Link copied!'; otherwise generates+uploads the deal page to Storage first, then copies the returned download URL (toast 'Could not generate link' on upload failure).
notes: Uploads to Firebase Storage on first use (no send), so no danger flag, but it does publish a public-readable deal page.

label: ← Back to Pipeline
expected_behavior: Generic goTo delegate navigates the SPA to the crm (pipeline) view. Static template header.

label: ⚡ GENERATE TODAY'S BRIEFING
expected_behavior: RepOS.generate() → generateBriefing: shows 'Generating...' state, collects D2D metrics (window.D2D.getKnocks), gamification, storm data (StormCenter), deal data (CloseBoard), weather (OpenWeather, needs nbd_weather_key), and coaching tips; builds today's briefing object, replaces today's entry in nbd_rep_briefings localStorage (30-day retention), re-renders the full briefing.
reveal_state: always (welcome screen when no briefing yet)
notes: Primary Rep OS entry control on the welcome/empty state. Weather card silently absent if no OpenWeather key in localStorage. Briefing is local-only (no Firestore).

label: 🔄 Refresh
expected_behavior: RepOS.regenerate() → clears todayBriefing then re-runs generateBriefing, rebuilding the day's briefing from fresh D2D/storm/deal/weather data. Header button.
notes: Only visible once a briefing exists.

label: VIEW (streak)
expected_behavior: data-repos-goto delegate calls window.goTo('d2d') then, because data-repos-d2d-tab='gamify' is present, window.D2D.setTab('gamify') to land on the gamification tab of the D2D tracker.
notes: Conditional on b.gamification (D2D.getGamification) being non-null.

label: OPEN STORM CENTER →
expected_behavior: data-repos-goto delegate → window.goTo('storm'). Card only renders when b.storms.activeAlerts>0 or activeZones>0.

label: CHECK DEALS →
expected_behavior: data-repos-goto delegate → window.goTo('closeboard'). Card renders when b.deals.active>0 or pending>0; the CHECK DEALS button itself only when deals.pending>0.

label: 📞 Call
expected_behavior: Native tel: anchor that dials the follow-up contact's phone (digits stripped of non-numerics). Rendered per follow-up row only when f.phone exists.
notes: Note: the tel href template uses '\\D' (double-escaped) inside the string literal — verify the digit-strip regex actually applies at runtime; it may leave formatting chars in the dialed number.

label: 🚪 Start Knocking
expected_behavior: data-repos-goto delegate → window.goTo('d2d'). Always present in the Quick Actions 2x2 grid once a briefing is rendered.
notes: Quick Actions grid: this is the non-gamify d2d shortcut (no d2d-tab attr → lands on default D2D tab).

label: ⛈️ Storm Center
expected_behavior: data-repos-goto delegate → window.goTo('storm'). Always present in Quick Actions grid.
notes: Distinct from the conditional Storm Opportunity card button (row 028).

label: 📋 Close Board
expected_behavior: data-repos-goto delegate → window.goTo('closeboard'). Always present in Quick Actions grid.
notes: Distinct from the conditional Deal Pipeline card button (row 029).

label: 🎓 Sales Practice
expected_behavior: data-repos-goto delegate → window.goTo('training'). Always present in Quick Actions grid.
notes: Verify 'training' is a valid SPA route target (sales-training view).

label: ← Back to Dashboard
expected_behavior: Generic goTo delegate → dash view. Static template header (tpl-view-repos).

route: #reports (view-reports, SPA view; static template + JS-hydrated panels)
label: ✨ Enrich Data
expected_behavior: data-action='call' data-fn='enrichReportData' → NBDReports.enrichData(): window.confirm dialog, then calls the 'backfillAnalytics' Cloud Function (httpsCallable) to derive time-of-day buckets, reverse-geocode knock GPS into city/zip, and parse lead addresses. Disables button to '⏳ Enriching...', alerts a summary, toasts result. Rate-limited 1/10min server-side (resource-exhausted handled).
notes: Server-side data backfill (one-time analytics enrichment). Guarded by a confirm dialog; safe (enriches only missing fields). Verify backfillAnalytics is deployed and GOOGLE_GEOCODING_API_KEY presence affects the 'geocoding skipped' branch.

label: OK (Run enrichment confirm)
expected_behavior: Native window.confirm: returning true proceeds with the backfillAnalytics call; false aborts before any server call. The confirm body lists the three enrichment actions and the 1-run/10-min limit.
notes: Native confirm — Cancel is the browser default; only OK is a meaningful action row here.

label: ＋ New Report
expected_behavior: data-action='call' data-fn='openReportGenerator' → NBDReports.openGenerator(): runs init() which renderGeneratorUI into #reportGeneratorContainer (template picker + date range + presets + comparison/AI toggles + Generate button) and listSavedReports, then scrolls #reportGenPanel into view.
notes: Primary entry to the report builder.

label: 🎯 Rep Monthly Review
expected_behavior: NBDReports.selectTemplate('rep-monthly') → sets _selectedTemplate and highlights the card (orange border). Drives which template generate() builds. Template = per-rep coaching deep dive (knocks, deals, revenue, velocity, top cities).
notes: Default-selected template on generator init.

label: 🗺️ Territory Deep Dive
expected_behavior: NBDReports.selectTemplate('territory') → selects the Territory template (best cities/zips, revenue-per-territory heatmap + ranked table) and highlights the card.

label: 📊 Pipeline Health Check
expected_behavior: NBDReports.selectTemplate('pipeline-health') → selects the Pipeline Health template (stage funnel, velocity, bottleneck detection, stuck deals) and highlights the card.

label: 💰 Revenue Recap
expected_behavior: NBDReports.selectTemplate('revenue-recap') → selects the Revenue Recap template (owner/partner meeting view: revenue breakdown, avg deal, closed vs pipeline, trend bar chart) and highlights the card.

label: 📖 Customer Journey
expected_behavior: NBDReports.selectTemplate('customer-journey') → selects the Customer Journey template. This template has requiresLead=true, so clicking Generate triggers the Pick-a-Customer lead-picker modal before building.
notes: Only template requiring a per-customer pick.

label: Period Start / Period End
expected_behavior: Date inputs (default last-30-days) read by generateSelected. Start>End is rejected with toast 'Start date must be before end date'. Define the report's reporting window (and the comparison baseline length).

label: Today / Last 7 days / Last 30 days / Last 90 days / Last 12 months / All time
expected_behavior: NBDReports.setQuickRange(key) → sets #reportRangeStart/#reportRangeEnd to the corresponding preset window (today, -7d, -30d, -90d, -365d, or 2020-01-01 for 'all'); end always = now.
notes: Six preset buttons sharing one handler — test each key writes the right start date.

label: Compare Against (none / vs Prior period / vs Same period last year)
expected_behavior: Select read by generateSelected → opts.compareMode. 'prior' computes the immediately-preceding same-length window; 'yoy' shifts the window back one year; metrics computed for both and rendered as delta chips. 'none' skips comparison.

label: Include Claude-written insights
expected_behavior: Checkbox (checked by default) → opts.includeNarrative. When true and window.callClaude exists, generate() awaits a Claude narrative paragraph; on failure or absence it falls back to a deterministic templated summary (never blocks the report).
notes: Triggers an AI/LLM call (callClaude) when enabled — verify the Claude callable is wired and the fallback path renders when it isn't.

label: 📈 Generate Report
expected_behavior: NBDReports.generateSelected() → reads range/compare/narrative, calls generate(_selectedTemplate, opts). For customer-journey, first opens the lead picker. Computes metrics + optional comparison + narrative, builds report HTML, SAVES it to Firestore (saveReport via window._saveReport, html stored for instant re-open), then opens it in NBDDocViewer (Print/PDF/Email/Save controls), and refreshes the My Reports list.
notes: Persists a report doc to Firestore. This + NBDDocViewer is the 'export/download' path the gap asks about — Print/PDF/Email/Save are inside the viewer, not the Reports view itself.

label: Search customers...
expected_behavior: Filters the customer list live (on input) by firstName/lastName/address/phone substring against window._leads; shows up to 100 rows. Empty result shows 'No customers match "q"'.
notes: Modal appears only when generating the customer-journey template without a preselected leadId.

label: <Customer name + address> row
expected_behavior: Clicking a customer row removes the overlay and calls onPick(lead.id) → re-invokes generate('customer-journey', {leadId, lead}) to build the journey report for that customer.
notes: Dynamically created button rows (no data-action; bound via addEventListener).

label: Cancel
expected_behavior: Dismisses the lead-picker overlay without generating a report (overlay.remove). Build is aborted.
notes: Confirm/cancel pair: the customer rows are the confirm path (row 050), this is the cancel.

label: Open (saved report)
expected_behavior: NBDReports.openSavedReport(id) → finds the report in window._reports and re-opens its stored html in NBDDocViewer.open (instant, no recompute) with Print/PDF/Email/Save. Toast 'Report not found' / 'Doc viewer not loaded' on failure.
notes: data-nr-stop='1' stops the card-level click propagation. The card itself (.nbd-saved-report) also has cursor:pointer but no separate handler.

label: 🗑 (delete saved report)
expected_behavior: NBDReports.deleteSavedReport(id) → window.confirm('Delete this report? This cannot be undone.'); on OK calls window._deleteReport(id) (Firestore delete), toasts '✓ Report deleted', and re-renders My Reports.
notes: DANGER=delete: irreversible Firestore delete of a saved report, gated by native confirm.

label: OK (Delete report confirm)
expected_behavior: Native window.confirm for deleteSavedReport: OK proceeds with the irreversible _deleteReport; Cancel aborts with no change.
notes: Confirm gate for the delete action (row 053).

label: 7 days / 30 days / 90 days / YTD
expected_behavior: Period toggle: addEventListener click → _writePeriod(key) (persists choice) then re-renders the performance dashboard (Revenue, Avg ticket, Leads added, Close rate tiles + delta vs previous period + conversion funnel). Computed live off lead/estimate data.
notes: Four period buttons sharing one handler; the active one is orange. Independent of the report-generator date range. Re-renders on 'nbd:data-refreshed' and on nav to Reports.

label: 📈 Reports
expected_behavior: Sidebar nav item → goTo('reports') opens the Reports SPA view (and triggers reports-dashboard/reports-trends re-render + NBDReports list refresh on view entry).
notes: Entry point to the whole Reports surface.

label: 🧠 Rep OS
expected_behavior: Sidebar nav item → goTo('repos') opens the Rep OS SPA view (RepOS.init renders the welcome/Generate-Briefing screen or today's existing briefing).
notes: Entry point to Rep OS. Mobile nav equivalent at dashboard.html:12215 (data-action='mobileNav' data-target='repos').
